INC-1042: Checkout API p99 latency exceeded 2s for ~20 minutes during peak traffic, driven by a slow upstream call to the payments worker. Customers saw spinner stalls at the pay step; no failed charges confirmed.
INC-1043: The payment webhook consumer exhausted its retry budget for three merchants after the provider returned sustained 503s. Events are accumulating in the dead-letter queue and require manual replay once upstream recovers.
INC-1044: The staging search index fell more than ten minutes behind the write log after a reindex job stalled. Search results on staging are stale but not erroring.
INC-1045: media-cdn edge nodes in the EU region began returning 5xx for a subset of image requests following an origin config push. Impact is partial and region-scoped.
INC-1046: The dev environment seed job intermittently fails on a fresh database due to a race between migration and seed steps. Low impact; dev-only.
INC-1047: The staging deploy orchestrator queue is backed up at 14 pending deploys and is not draining, blocking staging promotions.
INC-1048: Notification fanout p95 degraded and a backlog is forming after a downstream provider slowed. No drops yet, but delivery latency is rising.
INC-1049: The dev analytics box crossed 91% disk utilization. No service impact yet; cleanup or volume expansion needed before it fills.
INC-1050: flags-api began returning 401 for service tokens on staging after a signing key rotation went out of sync. Feature-flag reads are failing closed on staging.
INC-1051: The prod scheduler is firing jobs roughly 90 seconds late due to clock skew on the scheduler host. Low impact for tolerant jobs; flagged for follow-up.
